full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19590

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19590.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
mutter-40.9-26.el9_6.i686.rpm
mutter-40.9-26.el9_6.x86_64.rpm
mutter-devel-40.9-26.el9_6.i686.rpm
mutter-devel-40.9-26.el9_6.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
mutter-40.9-26.el9_6.aarch64.rpm
mutter-devel-40.9-26.el9_6.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/mutter-40.9-26.el9_6.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[40.9-26]
- Fix input latency regression
  Resolves: RHEL-117097
